name: marketing
description: Marketing plugin organized into 5 sub-verticals — Paid Acquisition, SEO & Content, Lifecycle & Retention, Positioning & Messaging, Analytics & Experimentation — with 12 specialist agents (1 director + 5 leads + 5 researchers + 1 creative-ops). Paid Acquisition is fully built for v0.1; the other 4 sub-verticals ship with stubs. Ad creative uses the same brief-and-judge architecture as the brand plugin: creative-ops writes channel-specific creative briefs, the user generates externally across Nano Banana Pro / Veo 3.1 / Higgsfield / Midjourney, and creative-ops judges returned candidates via multimodal vision. Output lives in .marketing/ in the target project.
